title: Copper Horse Armour Recipe
description: Now you can craft your own copper horse armour in 1.21.9
body:
🐴 Copper Horse Armor Recipe Datapack  
Give your steeds a gleaming upgrade—no smithing templates required!  
This datapack adds a balanced recipe for Copper Horse Armor, integrating seamlessly with survival progression and copper-based builds.

✨ Features  
✅ Shaped recipe using 7 copper ingots + 1 wool 
✅ Lore-friendly integration with overworld mining and early-game mobility  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.9+  

Checkout my other projects:

[Enchanted Golden Apple](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantd-golden-apple-recipe)
[Amethyst Shard](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amethyst-shard)

[Froglight Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/froglights-recipes)
[Music Disc Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/music-discs)
[Heavy Core Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/heavy-core-recipe)
[Echo Shard Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/echo-shard-recipes)
